title: Welcome to Magami OS
author: Magami OS Team
excerpt: Introducing our non-profit open-science initiative dedicated to accelerating drug discovery for African researchers using AI. Here's what we're building and why.

title: AI in Drug Discovery — A Primer for African Researchers
author: Magami OS Team
excerpt: An accessible introduction to how artificial intelligence is transforming drug discovery and what it means for researchers working on diseases prevalent in Africa.
